title: To Help Our Bleaker Parts
content:
To help our bleaker parts
    Salubrious hours are given,
    Which if they do not fit for earth
    Drill silently for heaven.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "To Help Our Bleaker Parts", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
